details: Large N1/N2/N3 demo lesson payload moved from apps/web/lib/learning-fixtures.ts to content/fixtures/learning/novice-demo-lessons.v0.1.json.
apps/web/lib/learning-fixtures.ts now imports the content fixture and exposes typed renderer adapter exports.
Runtime guardrails assert CMS/PostgreSQL remains production content source of truth, web role is renderer_adapter_consumer, fixture is not publishable, and source review is not production_ready.
productionReady is false and humanReviewRequired is true.
Provenance records active source root content/getcourse-finstrategy/.
Provenance records content-baseline inventory: 73 lesson URLs, 73 markdown lessons, 70 exported, 3 blocked, 73 humanReview required, 30 downloaded assets.

N3 provenance references content/getcourse-finstrategy/12-lesson-235010153.md and notes raw homework data was softened to forbid photos, address, exact sale amount, buyer chat and payment/bank screenshots.
Inactive exploratory paths are recorded as not used.

human_gates.area: lesson financial wording and quiz copy
human_gates.reason: Agent can prepare demo/import fixtures, but final financial correctness and public wording require human sign-off.

latest_self_verification.notes: Code/content boundary and tests pass. Financial lesson wording, quiz wording, legal-sensitive copy and reward wording remain human-gated.
